What We Do

Electrical Services

Comprehensive electrical solutions for homes and businesses. Licensed, insured, and guaranteed.

Residential Electrical

Wiring, outlets, switches, lighting installation, and whole-home electrical solutions.

From $89

Commercial Services

Office buildouts, retail lighting, industrial wiring, and code compliance upgrades.

Custom Quote

EV Charging Stations

Level 2 home charger installation, commercial charging networks, and Tesla wall connectors.

From $799

Panel Upgrades

Electrical panel replacement, capacity upgrades, and fuse box to breaker conversions.

From $1,499

Generator Installation

Whole-home backup generators, transfer switches, and automatic standby systems.

From $3,999

Emergency Repairs

24/7 emergency electrical service for power outages, sparking outlets, and safety hazards.

Call Now
Our Work

Before & After

See the VoltPro difference. Real projects, real results.

Before

Outdated 100-amp fuse box with overloaded circuits and no GFCI protection.

After

Brand-new 200-amp panel with arc-fault breakers, whole-home surge protection, and room for expansion.

Why VoltPro

18,000+ Jobs Done Right

VoltPro Electric has been powering homes and businesses since 2007. Our team of licensed master electricians brings decades of combined experience to every project.

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

“VoltPro upgraded our 1960s electrical panel and installed a whole-home generator. The work was meticulous, clean, and passed inspection on the first try. True professionals.”

Catherine Moore

Homeowner

“They installed my Tesla wall connector in under 3 hours. Clean routing, proper permits, and they even helped me set up the app scheduling. Couldn't be happier.”

Daniel Kim

Tesla Owner

“When our kitchen hood wiring failed during dinner service, VoltPro had someone there in 45 minutes. They diagnosed and fixed the issue without us losing a single order.”

Rachel Stevens

Restaurant Owner
